overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a foggy medieval town at dusk. The character moves from narrow stone alleys through archways and along waterfront docks, passing various NPCs before entering a dark tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley between high stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow passage between stone walls, approaching a more open area

entered.detail: tall weathered stone wall running along the left side of the path
tall weathered stone wall running along the right side of the path
tall stone tower with conical roof visible in the distance through the fog
cluster of medieval stone buildings with tiled roofs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow foggy alley flanked by high stone walls. As the character walks forward, the passage gradually opens to reveal a medieval tower and buildings in the distance. The atmosphere is moody and dimly lit with a blue-green foggy ambiance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone archway gate with torch lighting and guards

events.description: entering the covered stone archway that marks the gate to the inner town
warm torchlight from braziers becomes visible, contrasting with the cool fog

agents.ego_description: passing through the stone archway, moving past guards holding torches and other townsfolk

notable_agents.action: guard standing with torch, illuminating the archway entrance

entered.detail: large stone archway forming a gate through the town wall
burning torch mounted on the wall providing warm orange light
wooden cart with large wheels parked near the wall

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a imposing stone archway gate where the lighting shifts from cool fog to warm torchlight. Guards stand watch with burning torches as the character moves from the narrow alley into a more populated area near the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock area with wooden fencing along the canal

events.description: exiting the archway into the open waterfront area with visible water and docks

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path, passing a worker handling crates near the water's edge

notable_agents.action: shirtless worker lifting and moving wooden crates near the dock

entered.detail: rough wooden fence running along the edge of the water canal
calm waterway reflecting the dim light, bordered by wooden docks
wooden pier structure extending into the water with mooring posts
stacked wooden cargo crates near the waterfront

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway, the scene opens to a foggy waterfront with wooden docks and fencing along the water. The character walks along the dirt path passing a worker handling crates, with the sound of water lapping against the wooden pilings.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway leading into a dark tunnel passage

events.description: beginning to ascend the stone stairs toward the tunnel entrance
entering the dark tunnel archway, leaving the waterfront behind

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs and entering the dark tunnel ahead

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading upward to the tunnel entrance
arched stone tunnel mouth leading into darkness with faint light visible inside

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and climbs a set of stone stairs leading to a dark tunnel entrance. The waterfront elements fall away behind as the character ascends and enters the shadowy archway, transitioning from the open dock area into an enclosed passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody medieval town, transitioning from a claustrophobic foggy alley into an open waterfront before descending into darkness. It begins within a narrow passage flanked by high stone walls under a dim blue-green haze, moving forward as the view gradually expands to reveal distant towers and buildings. As the character passes through an imposing stone archway, the cool fog gives way to the warm glow of torches held by standing guards. The scene then opens onto a foggy waterfront where the camera follows a dirt path along wooden docks and fencing, passing a worker handling crates. Finally, the camera ascends a set of stone stairs, leaving the open docks behind to enter the shadowy enclosure of a dark tunnel.
